mapper.select: SELECT g.`name`,SUM(gd.`num`) AS `value` FROM goods AS g INNER JOIN goods_order AS gd ON gd.`goods_id` = g.`goods_id` GROUP BY g.`goods_id` ORDER BY `value` DESC LIMIT 3
select ma.`card_type` as `name`,count(ma.`apply_id`) as `value` from `member_apply` as ma group by ma.`card_type`,ma.`card_day` order by `value` desc limit 3

SELECT c.`course_name` AS `name`, COUNT(mc.`member_course_id`) AS `value` FROM `course` AS c LEFT JOIN `member_course` AS mc ON c.`course_id` = mc.`course_id` GROUP BY c.`course_id` ORDER BY `value` DESC LIMIT 3
